title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Infosys - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Infosys - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!
